title: Shall I Forget?
content:
Shall I forget on this side of the grave?
    I promise nothing: you must wait and see
        Patient and brave.
    (O my soul, watch with him and he with me.)

    Shall I forget in peace of Paradise?
    I promise nothing: follow, friend, and see
        Faithful and wise.
    (O my soul, lead the way he walks with me.)
meaning:
This evocative piece by Christina Georgina Rossetti, titled "Shall I Forget?", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
